channel.title: Posts on Stori Wyllt 2026
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Stori Wyllt 2026

item.title: Stori Wyllt Symposiwm
item.description:
Croeso i’r Stori Wyllt symposiwm!
Welcome to the Stori Wyllt symposium!

This will be an opportunity to meet the other practitioners on the project, and there’ll be a wildlife ID recording session with Carys May from West Wales Biodiversity Information Centre for teachers and artists.

Itinerary

  1. Croeso 4pm-4.15pm
  2. Wildlife ID recording 4.15pm-5.15pm
  3. Stori Wyllt outline 5.15pm-5.30pm
  4. Workshop structure 5.30pm-6pm
  5. Introductions & buffet 6pm-7pm

Just to recap, there are:

  • 4 schools
  • 5x 2-hour workshops Mar-Jun
  • Group sizes of 12-15 students
  • Group ages of Years 4, 5 & 6 (8 to 11)

And these are the amazing people involved:
